projectDescription: Join is an applicant tracking system (ATS) for SMB hiring teams that combines job multiposting to 250+ boards, AI-assisted job ad creation, candidate pipeline management, interview scheduling, scorecards, and recruitment automation in one platform.
keyFeatures: Multiposting to 10+ organic and 250+ paid job boards with one click
Quick Apply on 7 major boards for up to 3x more applications
AI-powered job description generator with bias detection and multilingual support
Kanban hiring pipeline with real-time team collaboration
Knockout screening questions with automatic rejection and audit trail
Self-service interview scheduling with Google Calendar and Outlook sync
Structured interview scorecards with panel aggregation
Shared candidate inbox with templates, merge fields, and scheduled sends
Visual no-code recruitment automation with conditional branching
Talent pools with candidate consent management
Two-tier roles & permissions model (3 company roles × 3 per-job roles)
GDPR compliant with EU data hosting and ISO 27001 certification
Zapier and Make integrations for third-party workflows
Public REST API access (Advanced and Enterprise plans)
publicApiSurface: Chrome extension — LinkedIn profile save to pipeline or talent pool
Jobs widget embed — embeddable HTML widget for careers pages
Webhook events — stage moves, application received, offer accepted/rejected
